justification: DCAT W3C rec ships every term with nine language-tagged rdfs:label values (en, fr, es, it, ja, ar, da, el, ko). ROBOT flags any entity with > 1 label per language pair of (entity × language) — DCAT is structurally incompatible with ROBOT's multiple_labels rule. Upstream-only.

Cross-namespace label collision between DCAT terms and project concept-scheme terms (e.g. dcat:temporalResolution vs ei:concept/temporal-resolution). Labels are semantically appropriate in both namespaces; project term IRIs disambiguate.

APOLLO_SV:00000032 label "count" collides with ei:concept/aggregation-type/count via OEO dependency on APOLLO. Project term IRIs disambiguate.
